title: PhonePe South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: PhonePe South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at PhonePe South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
